   "source": [
    "# Epic 2: Data Collection and Analysis\n",
    "import pandas as pd\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import seaborn as sns\n",
    "\n",
    "# Set the style for clean charts\n",
    "sns.set_theme(style=\"whitegrid\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# 2. Read the dataset file\n",
    "df = pd.read_csv('Crop_recommendation.csv')\n",
    "\n",
    "# 3. Print the first 5 rows to verify it loaded correctly\n",
    "df.head()"
   ]
  },

   "source": [
    "# Print statistical summaries (mean, min, max)\n",
    "print(\"Dataset Summary Statistics:\")\n",
    "display(df.describe())\n",
    "\n",
    "# Draw a distribution chart for Temperature\n",
    "plt.figure(figsize=(6, 4))\n",
    "sns.histplot(df['temperature'], kde=True, color='green')\n",
    "plt.title('Univariate Analysis: Temperature Distribution')\n",
    "plt.xlabel('Temperature in Celsius')\n",
    "plt.ylabel('Number of Records')\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "169fea86-18a7-49fa-a3e7-ff158235fd90",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1200x600 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Compare Nitrogen requirements across different crops\n",
    "plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6))\n",
    "sns.barplot(x='N', y='label', data=df, errorbar=None)\n",
    "plt.title('Bivariate Analysis: Nitrogen Requirements by Crop')\n",
    "plt.xlabel('Nitrogen (N) Level in Soil')\n",
    "plt.ylabel('Crop Type')\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "4eaf2e25-f185-4ba2-8a02-bef9787f6326",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 800x600 with 2 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Epic 2 Data Analysis Complete!\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Generate a Correlation Heatmap for numerical parameters\n",
    "plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))\n",
    "numeric_df = df.select_dtypes(include=[np.number])\n",
    "sns.heatmap(numeric_df.corr(), annot=True, cmap='coolwarm', fmt='.2f')\n",
    "plt.title('Multivariate Analysis: Parameter Correlation Matrix')\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Epic 2 Data Analysis Complete!\")"
   ]
  },
